InstanceConnectEndpointDnsNames.description: The DNS names of the endpoint.

DnsName.description: The DNS name of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint.

FipsDnsName.description: The Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) compliant DNS name of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint.

InstanceConnectEndpointPublicDnsNames.description: The public DNS names of the endpoint, including IPv4-only and dualstack DNS names.

Dualstack.description: The dualstack DNS name of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint. A dualstack DNS name supports connections from both IPv4 and IPv6 clients.

Ipv4.description: The IPv4-only DNS name of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint.

NetworkInterfaceId.description: The ID of the network interface.

SecurityGroupId.description: The ID of the security group.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

AvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

AvailabilityZoneId.description: The ID of the Availability Zone of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

ClientToken.description: The client token of the instance connect endpoint.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time that the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint was created

Id.description: The ID of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint.

InstanceConnectEndpointArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

NetworkInterfaceIds.description: The ID of the elastic network interface that Amazon EC2 automatically created when creating the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

OwnerId.description: The ID of the AWS account that created the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

PreserveClientIp.description: Indicates whether your client's IP address is preserved as the source when you connect to a resource.

PublicDnsNames.description: The public DNS names of the endpoint

SecurityGroupIds.description: The security groups associated with the endpoint.

State.description: The current state of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

StateMessage.description: The message for the current state of the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint. Can include a failure message

SubnetId.description: The ID of the subnet in which the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint was created.

Tags.description: The tags assigned to the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC in which the EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint was created
